Moosifur once knocked an entire glass of water off the counter just to watch it fall.
Moosifur's favorite napping spot is directly on top of whatever you're trying to use.
Moosifur has never met a cardboard box she didn't immediately claim as her own.
Moosifur refuses to eat the same flavour of wet food twice in a row. Variety is non-negotiable.
Despite turning her nose up at every hard treat ever offered, Moosifur will happily eat her regular kibble if presented as a treat.
Moosifur prefers deli-sliced turkey over the vastly inferior deli-sliced chicken.
Moosifur is a Ragdoll x Maine Coon mix; which perfectly explains why she has the fluff of a cloud and the attitude of a diva.
Born on September 5, 2013, Moosifur truly is an autumn queen.
